content: Remote OK Entry Level Administrative Assistant RecruitLytixs Hires <p>Our fast-growing company is seeking a dedicated <strong>Entry-Level Administrative Assistant</strong> to support the smooth operation of our daily business activities. In this role, you will assist with organizing, updating, and maintaining accurate company records and databases while ensuring information is handled efficiently and correctly.</p> <p>You will also provide general administrative support across teams, helping to improve workflow and streamline internal processes. Strong computer skills, a willingness to learn, and a keen eye for detail are essential for success in this position.</p> <p>This remote opportunity offers flexible working arrangements and the chance to grow within a supportive and dynamic work environment.</p> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>What Youâll Be Doing:</strong></p> <ul><li>Perform data entry and maintain accurate records across internal systems </li><li>Update spreadsheets, trackers, and documentation regularly </li><li>Organize digital files and ensure information is easy to access </li><li>Assist with scheduling, task coordination, and administrative workflows </li><li>Monitor and follow up on assigned tasks to ensure completion </li><li>Support internal teams by maintaining structured and up-to-date information </li><li>Identify and flag missing or inconsistent data for correction </li><li>Maintain clear and professional written communication </li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>What Weâre Looking For:</strong></p> <ul><li>Strong attention to detail and accuracy </li><li>Good organizational and time management skills </li><li>Ability to follow instructions and structured workflows </li><li>Basic familiarity with tools like Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel </li><li>Clear written communication skills </li><li>Ability to manage repetitive tasks with consistency </li><li>Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote environment </li><li>No prior experience required â training will be provided </li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Tools &amp; Work Environment:</strong></p> <ul><li>Spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel) </li><li>Internal tracking and documentation systems </li><li>Email and communication platforms </li><li>Remote collaboration tools (chat and video calls) </li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Benefits:</strong></p> <ul><li>Competitive entry-level compensation </li><li>Flexible remote working schedule </li><li>Structured onboarding and training support </li><li>Opportunities for career growth in administration and operations </li><li>Performance-based incentives </li><li>Supportive and collaborative remote team environment </li><li>Access to learning resources and skill development tools </li><br></ul> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Why Join?</strong></p> <p>This role offers a strong foundation in administrative support and digital operations. You will gain practical experience in data management, task coordination, and workflow organizationâskills that are highly transferable across various career paths.</p> <p>Â </p> <p><strong>Keywords:<br></strong><br>Administrative assistant â¢ Entry-level â¢ Remote role â¢ Data entry â¢ Office support â¢ Task coordination â¢ Digital organization â¢ Spreadsheet skills â¢ Work from home â¢ Career development</p> <p>Â </p> <p>Â </p> exec, customer support, dev Ø§ÙÙØ¯ÙÙØ©, Ø§ÙÙØ¯ÙÙØ© Ø§ÙÙØ¯ÙÙØ© Ø§ÙØ³Ø¹ÙØ¯ÙØ© 2026-06-17T15:23:59+00:00 1133566 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-entry-level-administrative-assistant-recruitlytixs-hires-1133566 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Operations Support Manager The Chartered Institute for Securities &amp; Investment (The CISI) <p><strong>Job Title: Operations Support Manager</strong></p><p><strong>Location:</strong> Riyadh</p><p><br></p><p><strong>About Us:</strong> The Chartered Institute for Securities &amp; Investment (CISI) is the leading professional body for securities, investment, wealth, and financial planning professionals. As a not-for-profit organisation, we represent 52,000 members globally. Due to the importance of our strategic partnership with the Financial Academy we are creating a full-time presence in Riyadh. Join us and be part of a team that is making a significant impact with professionalism globally.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Role Overview:</strong> Are you a customer centric and self-driven professional? We are looking for an Operations Support Manager to join our team, based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. In this role, you will be responsible for working closely with our key Partner The Financial Academy, supporting operational requirements and identifying opportunities to improve our service offering and exam candidate experiences. The role will involve market travel.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Key Responsibilities:</strong></p><ul><li>Support and coordinate end-to-end operational experiences for candidates sitting examinations through the Financial Academy, acting as a liaison between our delivery partners and the CISI operations team.</li><li>Maintain and strengthen relationships with key stakeholders.</li><li>Provide exceptional service and support to our partners and members, ensuring all aspects of the customer experience are seamless.</li><li>Collaborate with internal teams to deliver high-quality customer experiences.</li><li>Create and identify opportunities for improvements and service development.</li><li>Regular engagements at events with members and stakeholders.</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Personal Attributes:</strong></p><ul><li>Arabic language essential.</li><li>Customer centric, with excellent communication and interpersonal skills.</li><li>Strong organisational skills and resilience.</li><li>Attention to detail and problem-solving skills.</li><li>A pro-active and positive attitude.</li><li>Ability to work independently and as part of a high-performing team.</li><li>Previous experience in a Operations/Customer Service role.</li><li>Project management experience.</li><li>Familiar with analysis of business processes and customer journeys (desirable).</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Commitment to Integrity and Ethical Conduct:</strong></p><ul><li>Uphold the highest standards of integrity and ethical conduct in all interactions.</li><li>Ensure compliance with CISI's code of ethics and professional standards.</li><li>Promote a culture of transparency, honesty, and accountability.</li></ul><p></p> exec, customer support, dev Ø§ÙØ±ÙØ§Ø¶, Ø§ÙØ±ÙØ§Ø¶ Ø§ÙØ³Ø¹ÙØ¯ÙØ© 2026-06-17T14:55:36+00:00 1133565 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-operations-support-manager-the-chartered-institute-for-securities-amp-investment-the-cisi-1133565 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.p
